+--------------------[  Processing  ]+   +-----------------[  Authentication  ]+
|                                    |   |                                     |
| +-----------+        +---------+   |   |  +------------+        +---------+  |
| |  Execute  |<-------+  Parse  |<--o---o--+  Validate  |<-------+  Login  |  |
| +-----------+        +---------+   |   |  +------------+        +---------+  |
|                                    |   |                                     |
|                                    |   |                                     |
|                                    |   |                                     |
+------------------------------------+   +-------------------------------------+
